message:
test(artifacts): refresh per-crate test_log artifacts (fj-{ad,conformance,core,dispatch,interpreters,trace})

Re-record the schema-versioned test_log JSONs that each cargo test
emits via the artifact_logger sidecar.  Coverage breaks down by crate:

  fj-core               (39 files)  jaxpr build/validate/fingerprint,
                                    bfloat16/float16 round-trip props,
                                    transform_composition (single, double,
                                    triple stack; idempotent under proptest),
                                    tensor axis/slice helpers, ttl hash
                                    stability, scalar shape inference.
  fj-trace              (40 files)  shape inference unit + property tests
                                    across the v2 primitive set
                                    (bitcast_convert_type, broadcasted_iota,
                                    cbrt, complex/conj/imag/real,
                                    expand_dims, gather, integer_pow,
                                    is_finite, nextafter, one_hot,
                                    reduce variants, reshape, rev,
                                    scatter, select, shift_right_*,
                                    split, squeeze) plus the trace-context
                                    open/close finalize + closed-jaxpr
                                    schema contract tests.
  fj-interpreters       (57 files)  partial_eval and staging suites:
                                    DCE (empty/all-known/all-unused/
                                    selective/multi-output), constant fold
                                    chains, typed shape rules
                                    (broadcast_in_dim, dot, reduce by axis,
                                    reshape, transpose), staging round-trip
                                    + execute paths (all_known,
                                    all_unknown, mixed mask, error display).
  fj-conformance         (4 files)  control_flow_conformance,
                                    e2e_adversarial_fixture_suite,
                                    e2e_mixed_dtype_conformance,
                                    e2e_rng_determinism_full.
  fj-ad                  (1 file)   e2e_control_flow_ad oracle.
  fj-dispatch            (1 file)   e2e_vmap_tensor_ops oracle.
                                    -----
                                    142 files total.

Each file's payload changes are mechanical:
  - test_log header timestamp_unix_ms moves to the new run's wall clock.
  - duration_ms refreshes for the executing test.
  - phase_timings.{setup,execute,verify,teardown}_ms re-measure.
  - artifact_refs (packet ids, suite ids, /data/projects/... back-pointers),
    result, packet_id/suite_id details fields are unchanged.

Schema contract tests (test_core_test_log_schema_contract,
test_trace_test_log_schema_contract) remain green at the schema level --
no field shape changes.  Pure artifact refresh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
